00030 #ifndef _KERN_STAT_H_
00031 #define _KERN_STAT_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * The stat structure, for returning file information via stat(),
00035  * fstat(), and lstat().
00036  *
00037  * Fields corresponding to things you aren't implementing should be
00038  * set to zero.
00039  *
00040  * The file types are in kern/stattypes.h.
00041  */
00042 struct stat {
00043         /* Essential fields */
00044         off_t st_size;          /* file size in bytes */
00045         mode_t st_mode;         /* file type and protection mode */
00046         nlink_t st_nlink;       /* number of hard links */
00047         blkcnt_t st_blocks;     /* number of blocks file is using */
00048 
00049         /* Identity */
00050         dev_t st_dev;           /* device object lives on */
00051         ino_t st_ino;           /* inode number (serial number) of object */
00052         dev_t st_rdev;          /* device object is (if a device) */
00053 
00054         /* Timestamps */
00055         time_t st_atime;        /* last access time: seconds */
00056         time_t st_ctime;        /* inode change time: seconds */
00057         time_t st_mtime;        /* modification time: seconds */
00058         __u32 st_atimensec;     /* last access time: nanoseconds */
00059         __u32 st_ctimensec;     /* inode change time: nanoseconds */
00060         __u32 st_mtimensec;     /* modification time: nanoseconds */
00061 
00062         /* Permissions (also st_mode) */
00063         uid_t st_uid;           /* owner */
00064         gid_t st_gid;           /* group */
00065 
00066         /* Other */
00067         __u32 st_gen;           /* file generation number (root only) */
00068         blksize_t st_blksize;   /* recommended I/O block size */
00069 };
00070 
00071 #endif /* _KERN_STAT_H_ */
